publishedAbstract: * A RHEL/CoreOS host using the CephFS Kernel Client panics (RIP). * Messages similar to the following can be shown in `dmesg`, `journalctl` and `vmcore`: ~~~ list_del corruption. next-> prev should be ffff8a080e3025d8, but was ffff8a014839d5d8 ~~~ ~~~ kernel BUG at lib/list_debug.c:56! ~~~ ~~~__list_del_entry_valid.cold.1 at ffffffffb50dcf88 ceph_drop_caps_for_unlink at ffffffffc15720d1 [ceph] ~~~
